suites.title: Core Shared Validation Baseline
suites.description: Shared-core validation suite for the reusable core manifest, governed Markdown surfaces, and schema-backed control-plane artifacts.

steps.title: Validate pack contract
steps.description: Ensure the default pack settings surface and its declared validation surfaces load successfully.

steps.title: Validate governed front matter
steps.description: Validate the governed Markdown front matter targets selected by the repo baseline target enumerator.

steps.title: Validate governed document semantics
steps.description: Validate the governed Markdown semantic targets selected by the repo baseline target enumerator.

steps.title: Validate governed JSON artifacts
steps.description: Validate the schema-backed governed JSON artifacts selected by the repo baseline target enumerator.

suites.notes: The shared-core suite is not the live hosted-pack baseline. Active repo validation selects the suite declared by the active pack manifest.
